location: On a corpse in Siofra River, tucked beneath the stairway leading up to Hallowhorn Grounds, close to the Siofra River Bank Site of Grace.

source.name: corpse pickup, below Hallowhorn Grounds stairs

tactics: Descend into Siofra River via the Siofra River Well lift in eastern Limgrave (Mistwood)
From Siofra River Bank grace, find the stairway leading up toward Hallowhorn Grounds, but go underneath/left of the stairs to a lower platform where the corpse sits
Hallowhorn Grounds itself just holds the deer-carcass warp point for the optional Ancestor Spirit boss — that fight is unrelated to this pickup
lore: Carved from animal horn and carried by the master hunters among Nokron's ancestral followers, this bow was made to laden every arrow it fires with magic.

builds.name: Int/Dex hybrid
builds.why: Splits its base damage between physical and magic and pairs strongly with Int-scaling arrow types like Dwelling Arrows, which get a notable bonus specifically from this bow
